_source: Jira MCP: PXF-Invoices + PXF-Invoice Processing components, status != Done
_query: project = DEV AND component in ("PXF - Invoices", "PXF - Invoice Processing") AND issuetype = Epic AND statusCategory != Done
_notes: Release cadence resolved in order: (1) Business Requested Date (customfield_10863) if it carries "R{1-4}" tag or "R{1-4}, YYYY" style or "Mon DD, YYYY (RN)" style; (2) Standard GA Date (customfield_10324); (3) parse from epic summary as last resort.
Entrata release cadence: R1=Jan-Apr, R2=May-Jul, R3=Aug-Oct, R4=Nov-Dec (fiscal).
BRD is product-owned and stays static; primary date to plan against. Standard GA slips when engineering slips.
